Class StreamMessageListenerContainer.StreamReadRequest<K>

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.data.redis.stream.StreamMessageListenerContainer.StreamReadRequest<K>
Type Parameters:
K - Stream key and Stream field type.
Direct Known Subclasses:
StreamMessageListenerContainer.ConsumerStreamReadRequest
Enclosing interface:
StreamMessageListenerContainer<K, V extends Record<K,?>>
public static class StreamMessageListenerContainer.StreamReadRequest<K> extends Object
Request to read a Redis Stream.
Since:
2.2
Author:
Mark Paluch, Christoph Strobl, Christian Rest, DongCheol Kim, Su Ko
